### When to apply for the court’s permission E+W


[ F11 25.6. Unless the court directs otherwise, parties must apply for the court’s permission as mentioned in section 13(1), (3) or (5) of the 2014 Act or rule 25.4(2) as soon as possible and—


Textual Amendments


F11 Rule 25.6 substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 48


F12 Word in rule 25.6(e) substituted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 27(a) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


F13 Word in rule 25.6(e) substituted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 27(b) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


### What an application notice requesting the court’s permission must include E+W


25.7. — (1) Part 18 applies to an application for the court’s permission as mentioned in [ F14 section 13(1), (3) or (5) of the 2014 Act or ] rule 25.4 [ F14 (2) ] .


(2) In any proceedings—


(3) In children proceedings, an application notice requesting the court’s permission as mentioned in [ F16 section 13(1), (3) or (5) of the 2014 Act ] must, in addition to the matters specified in paragraph (2)(a), state the questions which the expert is to be required to answer.


Textual Amendments


F14 Words in rule 25.7(1) inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 49(a)
